fs_gate.scope: cot+ctf (REOPEN pre-registered terse metric; scripts/tinker_fs_gate.py standalone re-score)

in_driver_full_val_arm.disposition: KNOWN MEASUREMENT ARTIFACT, not format collapse: the in-driver gate scores all 141 val rows including the 21 replay (code-gen) rows that legitimately carry no [/REASONING] (all 21 no-[/REASONING] val targets are stream=replay; 20/141 terse is bounded by that set). Documented in scripts/tinker_fs_gate.py's docstring since the v1.2 run -- the canonical REOPEN metric is cot+ctf only. The in-driver temp0.7 arm never ran (process killed mid-arm after training + temp0.0 arm completed); the canonical standalone gate above covers both temps on the persisted ep3 checkpoint.
